alt.zh-TW: Animation AI Studio demo 錄影，展示作品頁、Job Dashboard、Results Browser 與 System Monitor。
alt.en: Animation AI Studio demo walkthrough showing the portfolio page, job dashboard, results browser, and system monitor.

caption.zh-TW: 公開展示用 WebM 影片，使用 mock-safe demo mode 產生的真實截圖串接而成。
caption.en: A public WebM walkthrough assembled from real mock-safe demo-mode screenshots.

alt.zh-TW: Animation AI Studio Web UI Job Dashboard，顯示 completed、running、failed demo scenarios。
alt.en: Animation AI Studio Web UI job dashboard with completed, running, and failed demo scenarios.

caption.zh-TW: Seeded demo data 讓使用者可立即看到排程、進度、錯誤狀態與 mock-safe pipeline 行為。
caption.en: Seeded demo data makes queue state, progress, failure handling, and mock-safe pipeline behavior immediately visible.

alt.zh-TW: Animation AI Studio Results Browser，顯示 demo output folders。
alt.en: Animation AI Studio result browser showing demo output folders.

caption.zh-TW: 瀏覽 repo-local demo artifacts，例如 summary、quality report、storyboard manifest 與 gallery preview。
caption.en: Browses repo-local demo artifacts such as summaries, quality reports, storyboard manifests, and gallery previews.

alt.zh-TW: Animation AI Studio System Monitor，顯示 CPU、RAM、GPU、Disk 與使用率圖表。
alt.en: Animation AI Studio system monitor showing CPU, RAM, GPU, disk, and usage chart.

caption.zh-TW: 用 FastAPI + SSE 呈現本地 AI pipeline 執行時最重要的資源監控訊號。
caption.en: FastAPI + SSE expose the resource signals that matter for local AI pipeline execution.

alt.zh-TW: Animation AI Studio GitHub Pages landing page。
alt.en: Animation AI Studio GitHub Pages landing page.

caption.zh-TW: 靜態作品頁整合產品定位、架構、截圖、錄影與本機啟動指引。
caption.en: The static project site combines positioning, architecture, screenshots, video, and local run instructions.

capabilities: Mock-safe demo mode that runs without API keys, model weights, or GPU access
Seeded demo scenarios for completed, running, and failed job states
FastAPI job orchestration with SQLite persistence
Result artifact browser for logs, summaries, manifests, and gallery previews
Realtime CPU/RAM/GPU/disk monitoring through SSE-compatible APIs
Static GitHub Pages demo site with screenshots and WebM walkthrough
Full-mode extension path for ComfyUI, image providers, TTS, FFmpeg, and batch scripts
